payload.label: tv
payload.short_description: black glossy TV screen, off, partial
payload.long_description: Partial dark rectangular TV screen with a glossy glass surface reflecting a bright table lamp and faint staircase balusters; appears turned off, edge-cropped at the right and slightly blurred, estimated ~1.5 m from the camera.
